arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Harvey Elliott message amid Liverpool transfer rumours
arts.sum: Arne Slot has refused to be drawn on speculation linking Harvey Elliott with a move away from Liverpool but admitted the midfielder has made his frustrations known at a lack of game-time

arts.ttl: Brentford vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and live stream and more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool could be without three players vs Brentford as Arne Slot ponders attacking reshuffle
arts.sum: Arne Slot could be left without a number of players for Liverpool's trip to Brentford on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool have five Khivcha Kvaratskhelia alternatives as PSG complete Kylian Mbappe replacement mission
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a long-term contract from Napoli, as Liverpool concede defeat in the race for the Georgian.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have not got best out of Darwin Núñez, admits Arne Slot
arts.sum: Uruguay striker has scored just four goals this season ‘Unfortunately for him, most teams sit back against us’ Arne Slot has admitted Liverpool have struggled to utilise Darwin Núñez’s strengths this season because of problems they encounter against deep-lying defences. The Uruguay international, Liverpool’s record signing at £85m, has scored four goals and started only 14 of Slot’s 31 matches. Núñez missed Tuesday’s draw at Nottingham Forest through suspension but could feature at Brentford on Saturday with Diogo Jota an injury doubt again. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains situation with Liverpool star who 'should not be happy'
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott has yet to start a Premier League game this season in a frustrating campaign so far which has been disrupted by injury which has even led to speculation about future

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez desperate for Liverpool repeat as he battles for Reds future
arts.sum: Liverpool are at Brentford on Saturday and it has previously been a happy hunting ground for Darwin Nunez but can he find the scoring touch before time runs out on Merseyside?

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits he has not been able to 'bring the best out of' Darwin Nunez - with the Reds No 9 scoring just two league goals so far this season
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Reds No 9 has scored just four goals all season - only two of those coming in the Premier League - and has fallen out of favour in terms of the current Liverpool starting XI.

arts.ttl: Andrew Robertson decision made as £64m man returns: Liverpool predicted XI v Brentford
arts.sum: Liverpool will hope to extend their lead at the top of the Premier League table to seven points when they head to Brentford on Saturday....

Liverpool megastars Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk are on the verge of signing for Al-Hilal, according to Saudi sports pundit Khaled Al-Shenaif. Despite sitting comfortably atop the Premier League standings, Liverpool are facing a potential doomsday scenario with key players Van Dijk, Salah and Trent Alexander-Arnold out of contract at the end of the season.
